name: Asteroid Dodge
description: Asteroid Dodge ∞ is a fast-paced space shooter where you pilot a fighter jet through an endless asteroid field. Dodge, blast, and survive as difficulty increases with every level! Collect coins to unlock powerful jets — each with a unique special ability. Equip the Dual Cannon for double firepower, or activate abilities like Time Freeze, Force Shield, and Mega Blast to turn the tide of battle. Earn more by watching ads to double your coin rewards after each game. Simple one-finger controls. Endless fun. How long can you survive?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
